message:
🐛 Fix analytics-collect Netlify Function 502 error (#1280)

- Add @netlify/functions dependency for proper V2 function types
- Use Netlify.env.get() for env var access (V2 API) with process.env fallback
- Add Config.path for direct function routing (remove redirect)
- Return error details in 502 response for debugging

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -42,11 +42,8 @@
   status = 200
   force = true
 
-# GA4 analytics proxy — event collection via Netlify Function (rewrites decoy tid → real)
-[[redirects]]
-  from = "/t/g/collect"
-  to = "/.netlify/functions/analytics-collect"
-  status = 200
+# GA4 analytics proxy — event collection handled by analytics-collect function
+# (uses Config.path in the function, no redirect needed)
 
 # SPA routing - redirect all routes to index.html (only if file doesn't exist)
 [[redirects]]
